title: uvaria ovata subsp. ovata
intro: Uvaria ovata subsp. ovata, also known as the African plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Uvaria ovata subsp. ovata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations, including tinctures and ointments.
